title: rubus idaeus var. marmoratus
intro: Rubus idaeus var. marmoratus, also known as the marbled raspberry, is a variant of the red raspberry species that is characterized by its distinctive marbled appearance on the leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. marmoratus include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves and roots being used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
